commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs human maintainer handling for proof and merge-risk acceptance; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern was found; the diff is plugin-local memory-wiki source handling and tests with no dependency, workflow, secret, or permission changes. (sha=fda6a5b54981e0280e9f9feb28e3baa53152b91b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds memory-wiki imported-source `path-mismatch` retry coverage and process-local coalescing for concurrent bridge-mode imported-source syncs, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +115, Tests +233. Total +348 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main routes `wiki.status`, `wiki.importInsights`, and `wiki.palace` through uncoalesced imported-source sync, and only the write boundary retries `path-mismatch`. I did not rerun the full reporter-scale WSL2/RSS workload.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human maintainer handling for proof and merge-risk acceptance; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): harden bridge imports under concurrent syncs
target.body:
## Summary

- Add bounded retry handling for transient `FsSafeError: path-mismatch` while writing imported memory-wiki source pages.
- Coalesce concurrent bridge imported-source syncs for the same vault/config through index refresh, keying on bridge artifact-discovery inputs such as `agents.defaults.workspace`.
- Preserve existing vault safety boundaries for symlink/path-alias and directory collision cases.
- Rebase the existing PR onto current `origin/main` and resolve the `source-page-shared.ts` conflict by keeping main's human Notes preservation / `writeGuardedVaultPage` path while retaining the PR's imported-source stat/read `path-mismatch` retry.
- What did NOT change: no channel delivery, provider routing, session state, or plugin-hook contract; the change is confined to the `extensions/memory-wiki` import/sync source path.
- Why it matters / User impact: concurrent memory-wiki bridge imports no longer run duplicate import passes or fail on transient fs `path-mismatch`, without weakening symlink/path safety.

Related to #91154.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Concurrent bridge imported-source syncs for the same vault/config are coalesced (single underlying artifact listing + index refresh), imported source-page writes retry transient fs-safe `path-mismatch`, and the conflict-resolved head preserves existing human Notes while keeping symlink/path-alias safety.
- **Real environment tested:** Linux worktree `/media/vdb/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-91828`, Node 22.22.0, rebased head `fda6a5b54981e0280e9f9feb28e3baa53152b91b` against `origin/main` `d84a8b15063aa09418fe532a7ec99d04e4a93bfe`. Local filesystem-backed memory-wiki vault/workspace fixtures only.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
git -C "/media/vdb/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-91828" grep -n "<<<<<<<\|=======\|>>>>>>>" -- "extensions/memory-wiki/src"
```

```bash
git -C "/media/vdb/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-91828" diff --check
```

```bash
cd "/media/vdb/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-91828" && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-wiki/src/{bridge,source-page-shared,source-sync}.test.ts
```

- **Evidence after fix:**

```text
2026-06-23 verification on head fda6a5b54981e0280e9f9feb28e3baa53152b91b:
- conflict marker grep under extensions/memory-wiki/src: passed with no output
- git diff --check: passed with no output
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-wiki/src/{bridge,source-page-shared,source-sync}.test.ts
- [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 199.55s
- Test Files: 3 passed
- Tests: 21 passed
- Failed: 0
```

- **Observed result after fix:** All 21 focused memory-wiki tests pass on rebased head `fda6a5b54981e0280e9f9feb28e3baa53152b91b`, including coalesced concurrent bridge sync, default-workspace separation, transient source-page path-mismatch retry, bridge import count preservation after retry, human Notes preservation, and symlink/path-alias safety.
- **What was not tested:** No reporter-scale ~1,900-file WSL2/RSS-pressure workload, no live external channel transport (Feishu/Slack/IRC), and no third-party provider/API credential proof were re-run on this head. This update re-verifies the conflict-resolved local memory-wiki source path and does not claim those unavailable live environments.
- **Fix classification:** Root cause fix

## Review findings addressed

- **RF-001 [P1] coalescing identity must match artifact-discovery inputs:** Fixed/verified on current head — `resolveImportedSourceSyncKey` includes vault path/mode, bridge/ingest/render/search/context/obsidian config, `agents.defaults.workspace`, and agent id/default/workspace entries, so concurrent bridge syncs with different default workspaces are not collapsed. Covered by `source-sync.test.ts` default-workspace separation and focused suite passing 21/21 tests.
- **RF-002 [P1] canonical retry overlap with #94443:** Addressed for this conflict-resolved head, with maintainer decision still explicit — current `origin/main` provides the shared `writeGuardedVaultPage` retry path, and this rebase keeps that source-of-truth write helper instead of reintroducing the older direct `vault.write` retry branch. The PR still adds imported-source stat/read retry and bridge coalescing; maintainers should make the final broad-vs-narrow canonical merge decision.
- **RF-003 [P1] reporter-scale ~1,900-file WSL2/RSS proof gap:** Disclosed as unavailable in this environment — this update does not claim reporter-scale WSL2/RSS-pressure proof. The conflict-resolved head is verified with local filesystem-backed regression coverage and prior local proof remains bounded to the local environment.
- **RF-004 [P2] broad-vs-narrow retry/coalescing merge path decision:** Maintainer decision — there is no additional narrow automated patch defect in this update. The actionable author-side work here was resolving the main conflict, avoiding a divergent retry implementation, and re-verifying the exact head.
- **RF-005 [signal] retry-accounting real behavior proof:** Fixed/verified on current head — recovered `path-mismatch` bridge imports preserve `importedCount=1` / `skippedCount=0`, covered by `bridge.test.ts`; the focused memory-wiki suite passes 21/21 after conflict resolution.

## Competition / linked PR analysis

- ClawSweeper flagged overlap with #94443 on transient `path-mismatch` retry behavior.
- This conflict resolution uses the current main shared `writeGuardedVaultPage` retry behavior for the write boundary and keeps this PR focused on imported-source stat/read retry plus bridge import/index-refresh coalescing.
- This avoids restoring a divergent direct write retry path, but it does not override the remaining maintainer choice about broad-vs-narrow canonical merge direction.

## Regression Test Plan

- **Target test file:** `extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts`, `extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.test.ts`, `extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts`
- **Scenario locked in:** coalesced concurrent imported-source sync (single artifact listing, identical results, idempotent rerun), separate in-flight syncs when default workspaces differ, transient `path-mismatch` retry on source-page write, preserved bridge import counts after retry, preserved human Notes, and preserved symlink/path-alias + directory-collision refusal.
- **Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail:** asserts the import/sync owner behavior at the source boundary without coupling to unrelated channel or gateway implementation details.

## Origin / follow-up

Existing PR tied to #91154. This update only rebases the existing PR onto `origin/main` `d84a8b15063aa09418fe532a7ec99d04e4a93bfe`, resolves the source-page conflict, and revalidates exact head `fda6a5b54981e0280e9f9feb28e3baa53152b91b`.

## Merge risk

- **Risk labels considered:** `merge-risk: 🚨 session-state`, `extensions: memory-wiki`.
- **Risk explanation:** Behavior change is limited to memory-wiki import/sync coalescing and retry; concurrent callers now share one underlying bridge import/index-refresh pass for the same resolved config identity.
- **Why acceptable:** Diff is confined to `extensions/memory-wiki`, regression tests cover the coalescing/retry/safety invariants, and no shared channel/provider/session contract is touched.

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** Concurrent bridge imported-source syncs for the same vault/config each performed independent artifact-discovery + import passes, and source-page stat/read/write treated transient fs `path-mismatch` races as fatal.
- **Why this is root-cause fix:** The fix coalesces at the import/sync source boundary (the owner of imported-source discovery) and adds bounded retry on the transient fs error, rather than masking duplicate passes downstream.
- **Fix classification:** Root cause fix
- **Maintainer-ready confidence:** High, bounded by the disclosed unavailable reporter-scale/live proof.
- **Patch quality notes:** No skipped tests / lint suppressions; bounded retry is for a transient, identified fs condition, not a blanket catch.
- **Architecture / source-of-truth check:** The memory-wiki import/sync module owns imported-source discovery and page writes; this change is on that owner path, not a downstream projection/fallback.
target.author: mushuiyu886
